creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 156805
patch to drop support for pgsql 8.4

The Postgresql 8.4 expired on 2015-05-10 because upstream discontinued support for them in July 2014. Patch Mk/Uses/pgsql.mk to remove support for this version.

databases/pglesslog is affected by this change and has been tested in bug #200096
